title: BEM-922 provider architecture scan
objective:
Run script:
"""
from pathlib import Path
import json, re
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
ctx_text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
keywords = [
    'provider','providers','провайдер','провайдеры','claude','cloud','codex','gpt','analyst','аналитик','auditor','аудитор','executor','исполнитель','primary','основной','reserve','резерв','backup','лимит','limit','контур','contour','OPENAI','runner'
]
patterns = ['governance/**/*.md','governance/**/*.json','governance/**/*.yml','governance/**/*.yaml','governance/**/*.py','.github/workflows/*.yml','.github/workflows/*.yaml','**/*.md','**/*.json','**/*.py','**/*.ts','**/*.js','**/*.yml','**/*.yaml']
seen = set()
files = []
for pat in patterns:
    for p in Path('.').glob(pat):
        if p.is_file() and str(p) not in seen and not any(part in {'.git','node_modules'} for part in p.parts):
            seen.add(str(p)); files.append(p)
relevant = []
for p in files:
    try:
        text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
    except Exception:
        continue
    low = text.lower(); pathlow = str(p).lower()
    score = sum(3 for k in keywords if k in pathlow) + sum(1 for k in keywords if k in low)
    if score:
        hits = []
        lines = text.splitlines()
        for i, line in enumerate(lines, start=1):
            ll = line.lower()
            if any(k in ll for k in keywords):
                hits.append(f'L{i}: {line[:260]}')
            if len(hits) >= 18:
                break
        relevant.append({'score':score,'path':str(p),'hits':hits})
relevant = sorted(relevant, key=lambda x: x['score'], reverse=True)[:90]
summary = {
  'status':'SCANNED',
  'context_exists':ctx.exists(),
  'top_files':[{'path':r['path'],'score':r['score']} for r in relevant[:30]],
  'explicit_note':'scan intended to verify provider model: GPT analyst, Claude auditor/executor, reserve GPT-Codex/Codex when Claude limits'
}
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports/BEM922_PROVIDER_ARCH_SCAN.json').write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
md = '# BEM-922 Provider architecture scan\n\nStatus: SCANNED\n\n## AGENT_CONTEXT snippets\n'
for line in ctx_text.splitlines():
    ll=line.lower()
    if any(k in ll for k in ['claude','codex','gpt','provider','провайдер','контур','limit','лимит','bem-921','bem-920']):
        md += line + '\n'
md += '\n## Relevant repository hits\n'
for r in relevant:
    md += f"\n### {r['path']} | score={r['score']}\n" + '\n'.join(r['hits']) + '\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM922_PROVIDER_ARCH_SCAN.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM922_PROVIDER_ARCH_SCAN_READY.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-922 provider architecture scan proof\nStatus: READY\nReport: governance/reports/BEM922_PROVIDER_ARCH_SCAN.md\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/reports/BEM922_PROVIDER_ARCH_SCAN.json','governance/reports/BEM922_PROVIDER_ARCH_SCAN.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM922 provider architecture scan ready')
"""
